name: @bloomengine/engine-prebuilt
description: Prebuilt bloom_<platform> static libraries — the engine's per-platform native crate (Rust + statically-merged JoltPhysics + bloom_jolt shim) compiled on the appropriate native CI runner, shipped self-contained so consumers and the Perry build hub never need a target-specific C/C++ toolchain. Mirrors @bloomengine/jolt-prebuilt.
